mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_result(user_id, subject, question_source, score, duration_seconds, simulation_mode, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subject}, #{questionSource}, #{score}, #{durationSeconds}, #{simulationMode}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, subject, IFNULL(question_source, '') AS questionSource, score, duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, IFNULL(simulation_mode, '演示模式') AS simulationMode, create_time AS createTime FROM exam_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, subject, IFNULL(question_source, '') AS questionSource, score, duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, IFNULL(simulation_mode, '演示模式') AS simulationMode, create_time AS createTime FROM exam_result WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_result SET subject = #{subject}, question_source = #{questionSource}, score = #{score}, duration_seconds = #{durationSeconds}, simulation_mode = #{simulationMode}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
